hero.headline: Invest in your own tech. Stop renting software.

hero.subheadline: We transform your unique workflows into high-performance platforms. You pay for the development and the system is 100% yours, no endless subscriptions.

problem.sectionSubtitle: Discover why leading companies choose to own their technology.
problem.title: The problem with generic software
problem.subtitle: The Promptive solution
problem.pain1Desc: Generic SaaS with endless monthly payments that squeeze your profitability without owning the system.
problem.pain2Desc: Packaged systems where your business must adapt to the software, and not the other way around.
problem.pain3Desc: Standard interfaces and rigid tools that prevent you from standing out from the competition.
problem.sol1Desc: One-time investment. We develop your transactional platform and the code is 100% yours. No licenses.
problem.sol2Desc: Architecture designed exactly for how your business operates, automating your unique processes.
problem.sol3Desc: High-impact interfaces, immersive user experience and unique design that projects authority.
problem.pain4Desc: Payment models per user or data volume that penalize and make your company's growth more expensive.
problem.sol4Desc: Add users, processes and data without additional charges. Scalable architecture that grows with your business success.

ceo.name: Luigi Bravo
ceo.bio: With over 10 years of experience as a Full Stack developer and Web3 builder, I lead a passionate team dedicated to transforming complex ideas into platforms that drive businesses. My mission is to give every client the technology they deserve.

results.title: Results that speak
results.subtitle: Real metrics from delivered projects
results.client1Quote: The team exceeded our expectations. They developed an agile and modern platform that centralized our communication operations, allowing us to scale with total confidence.
results.client2Quote: Thanks to their custom technology, we automated regulatory tracking and environmental project traceability. The data precision outperformed any generic software on the market.
results.client3Quote: We manage complex workflows for vessels and industrial plants. The built platform incredibly optimized our logistics cost controls and real-time production, vital in our sustainable fishing.
results.client4Quote: Materializing our Web3 vision with AI was no easy task. They masterfully integrated autonomous agents and blockchain connections, creating the exact tech ecosystem we needed at Gopohra.

webResults.title: Proven results
webResults.subtitle: Experts in creating high-impact web platforms

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We resolve your doubts before starting
faq.q1: Is it hard to migrate my current system?
faq.a1: We specialize in seamless integrations without disrupting your operation. We analyze your current stack and create a zero-downtime migration plan.
faq.q2: How long does a project take?
faq.a2: It depends on scope, but a functional MVP is usually ready in 2-4 weeks thanks to our agile methodology with incremental deliveries.
faq.a3: We work with the most modern stack: Next.js, React, Node.js, Python, AWS, and databases like PostgreSQL and MongoDB. We choose the best tool for each project.
faq.a4: Yes. We include technical support and continuous monitoring. We ensure your platform works perfectly 24/7.
faq.a5: We follow an agile methodology with weekly sprints, progress meetings and incremental deliveries so you always have visibility of progress.
faq.q6: Will the visual design be completely customized to my brand?
faq.a6: Absolutely. We don't use recycled templates or standard rigid designs. Every button, animation, color palette, and visual component is created from scratch and meticulously aligned with your company's Premium identity to strongly differentiate you from competitors.
faq.q7: Can I request changes during the UI/UX design phase?
faq.a7: Of course. The design phase is iterative and includes revision points where you are key. We want to ensure that the final aesthetic isn't just visually impeccable and luxurious, but projects the exact 'look and feel' your brand requires.
faq.q8: Are designs built to look great on both web and mobile?
faq.a8: Definitely. Our approach is deeply 'Responsive and Mobile-First'. We make sure the design experience is fluid, fast, and architecturally beautiful on any screen, be it a giant curved monitor or a modern smartphone.

privacy.title: Authorization and Processing of Personal Data
privacy.p1: The client expressly authorizes LUCIERNAGA & ASOCIADOS SOCIEDAD ANONIMA CERRADA, identified with RUC No. 20609213770 and domiciled at Cal. Michigan Nro. 105 Dpt. 4 Urb. La Rinconada del Lago, Lima, Peru, to manage and process their personal data provided through the contact channels of our agency. Personal data will be stored and processed in accordance with current data protection regulations in Peru.
privacy.h2_1: → Authorization and Processing of Personal Data
privacy.p2: The personal data provided will be processed for the following purposes:
privacy.li1: Sending commercial information, promotions, and advertising related to our services and products.
privacy.li2: Conducting commercial prospecting for the identification of new business opportunities.
privacy.li3: Storage and processing of data for statistical and/or historical purposes to improve our services.
privacy.p3: The data will be processed indefinitely until the client requests its cancellation or revokes the authorization granted.
privacy.h2_2: → Exercise of ARCO Rights (Access, Rectification, Cancellation, and Opposition)
privacy.p4: The client has the right to exercise their ARCO rights (Access, Rectification, Cancellation, and Opposition) regarding their personal data. To exercise these rights, the client must send a request that includes:
privacy.li6: Clear and precise description of the data on which they wish to exercise their rights.
privacy.li7: Address or contact medium to receive the response to their request.
privacy.p5: Said request must be sent to the email info@promptiveagency.com, or to our physical address indicated in Lima, Peru.
privacy.p6: If the client considers that their request has not been addressed properly, they may file a complaint with the National Authority for the Protection of Personal Data in Peru.

webPricing.title: Web Design Plans
webPricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your business. All plans include domain, hosting and corporate email.
webPricing.web1Desc: Perfect for entrepreneurs and professionals who need quick online presence.
webPricing.web2Desc: Ideal for businesses that need multiple sections and professional content.
webPricing.web3Desc: For companies that require advanced features and maximum customization.

webPricing.ecom2Desc: Complete online store with broad catalog and basic inventory management.
webPricing.ecom3Desc: Complete customized solution for serious high-volume e-commerce.

webFaq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
webFaq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our web development service
webFaq.q1: How long does it take to build my website?
webFaq.a1: Depending on the plan, between 7 and 18 business days. We send weekly progress updates so you can see the progress.
webFaq.q2: What does the domain and hosting include?
webFaq.a2: We include a .com domain for 1 year and premium hosting with SSL certificate, optimized speed and 99.9% guaranteed uptime.
webFaq.q3: Can I upgrade my plan later?
webFaq.a3: Of course! You can migrate to a higher plan at any time. You just pay the difference and we adapt your website.
webFaq.a4: Logo design is not included in base plans, but we can add it as an additional service at a preferential price.
webFaq.q5: What payment gateways do you accept for e-commerce?
webFaq.a5: We integrate MercadoPago, Stripe, PayPal and local bank gateways. We also configure WhatsApp payments.
webFaq.a6: Yes, we offer monthly maintenance plans that include updates, backups and technical support. The first 30 days of support are included.
